title: Event type filter + classifier
glance: Friends can filter the shared feed by event type. Events classify asynchronously after ingest (rules by default; optional InsForge AI). Admins can override and backfill.
backgroundDeep: Event Radar stored Luma metadata without categories. Feed filters were only response-state (all/pending/accepted).
backgroundNarrow: This branch adds type columns, a classifier, feed type pills, card labels, admin override, and deploy/migrate notes.
goal: Ship triage by event type without blocking calendar sync or inventing a fragile keyword-only system.
figure: Ingest→async classify→primary_type→feed pills
intuition: Insert first so sync stays fast. Untyped rows stay under All; Other means we tried and could not type it. Human overrides stick.

steps.label: Schema + classifier
steps.body: Migration adds primary_type/type_source. Classifier supports off/mock/rules/insforge with soft-fail.

steps.label: API + ingest hook
steps.body: serializeEvent returns type fields; scheduleEventTypeClassification runs after insert; admin PATCH/backfill routes.

steps.label: Feed UI
steps.body: Type filter pills compose with pending/accepted; cards show tag-pill labels; admin select overrides.

steps.label: Harden + deploy
steps.body: Missing model confidence → fallback; migrate note in production docs; unit tests green.

quiz.q: Before prod filters work you must?

microWorld: Optional: playground mapping title → predicted type for the proxy corpus.
